message:
fix(notion): fix borrow checker issue in PII redaction and validate search risk level

Fix lifetime conflict in redact_person_fields where prop_type borrowed
from prop while prop was mutated. Clone prop_type to owned String.
Update tests to assert notion.search is correctly classified as medium
risk with a dedicated capability, separate from low-risk read operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
